name: smart-budget-performance-tests
description: k6 Performance & Load Testing Framework for Smart Budget Web + Android
author: Smart Budget Team

scripts.baseline: npm run test:baseline && npm run report:baseline
scripts.test:smoke: k6 run --env SCENARIO=smoke  --out csv=reports/results.csv --out json=reports/smoke_raw.json  tests/fullLoadTest.js
scripts.test:load: k6 run --env SCENARIO=load   --out csv=reports/results.csv --out json=reports/load_raw.json   tests/fullLoadTest.js
scripts.test:stress: k6 run --env SCENARIO=stress --out csv=reports/results.csv --out json=reports/stress_raw.json tests/fullLoadTest.js
scripts.test:spike: k6 run --env SCENARIO=spike  --out csv=reports/results.csv --out json=reports/spike_raw.json  tests/fullLoadTest.js
scripts.test:full: k6 run --env SCENARIO=full   --out csv=reports/results.csv --out json=reports/full_raw.json   tests/fullLoadTest.js
scripts.report:all: npm run report:generate && npm run docs:generate
scripts.run:all: npm run test:login && npm run test:registration && npm run test:dashboard && npm run test:expense && npm run test:budget && npm run test:ai && npm run report:all
